articles.author: Jessica Freeborn
articles.title: Water sources may affect Parkinson's disease risk: What to know
articles.description: Where drinking water comes from and what it contains may affect Parkinson's disease risk, a recent study suggests.
articles.content:
• A recent study evaluated how groundwater relates to risk for Parkinsons disease.
  • The study found that the age of groundwater and aquifer type may both impact risk for Parkinsons.
